title: Fido
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the probe droid|the [[Foreign Intruder Defense Organism]], short FIDO}}
[[File:Fido.jpg|thumb|Fido in front of one of the [[Three Sisters]].]]
'''Fido''' was [[Grif Grawley]]'s [[probe droid/Legends|probe droid]], which Grif used for surveillance and scouting, and as an alarm in the wastelands of [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]].<ref name="jk">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

==History==
Grif Grawley built the flyer himself sometime before [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]; according to his custom of naming affectionately his equipment, he gave the drone the name "Fido", and used it when he camped in the desert.<ref name="jk" />

One of those routine herding nights turned out to be fateful, when Grif noticed an [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] [[probe droid/Legends|probe droid]], the harbinger of an invasion. Grif left his post attempting to disable [[PD 4786|that droid]] and then walked to [[Fort Nowhere]] to warn the settlers. Not long after, the Fort [[battle of Fort Nowhere|was attacked]] destroyed, while Grif was safely away.<ref name="jk" />

Grif provided refuge to the survivors of the massacre in the [[Unidentified Ruusan temple|ruins of a Jedi temple]]; eventually the [[light freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Moldy Crow/Legends|''Moldy Crow'']] arrived to the landing zone east of their hideout, and [[Jan Ors]] and [[Kyle Katarn]] emerged. Fido was sent to approach, and Jan was about to unholster her [[blaster/Legends|blaster]] when Kyle stopped her hand; Fido investigated them and entered the ship to inspect it, where droid [[WeeGee]] was stationed. Then by moving to the west, returning, and leaving again, it beckoned the two [[agent/Legends|agents]] to follow, leading them to their hideout.<ref name="jk" />

A couple of days later, Fido notified Grif about the arrival of an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] and an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] approaching from the south. It was a patrol led by [[Yun]], sent to investigate the disappearance of an [[Patrol 341|Imperial]] patrol that the colonists exterminated earlier.<ref name="jk" />

==Characteristics==
Fido was custom-built, and its components were carried in an old and gruff metallic case. The components included gyros for movements and assortments of [[sensor/Legends|sensors]]. Each time he camped in the desert to herd his [[gra]], Grif assembled the parts into a [[boomerang/Legends|boomerang]]-shaped miniature [[Flier|flyer]].<ref name="jk" />

Griff would throw it do a desired direction and Fido then would soar to an appropriate location, switching its power to standby. During the night, Fido would circle Grif's place at regular five-[[standard minute/Legends|minute]] intervals and feed [[hologram/Legends|holos]] to Grif's monitors, sense for signs of danger, such as predators or atmospheric anomalies, and if need be, trigger an alarm.<ref name="jk" />

{{Droid-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''
